title: Delhi High Court lifts stay on eviction proceedings against Delhi Race Club
description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday allowed the Central government to resume eviction proceedings against the Delhi Race Club over its continued occupation of government land in central Delhi [Union of India & Anr v Delhi Race Club Ltd.]A Bench comprising of Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya and Justice Tejas Karia allowed an appeal filed by the Union government against an interim order that had stopped eviction proceedings against the Delhi Race Club under the Public Premises (Eviction of
